title: poaceae
intro: The rank Poaceae is a family of flowering plants commonly known as grasses. This family is one of the largest and most widespread, comprising over 12,000 species. Poaceae are primarily grasses that are found in a wide range of habitats, from tropical rainforests to arctic tundras and deserts. They are characterized by their long, narrow leaves and inflorescences that produce seeds, often in the form of grains or grains-like structures.
